description: A machine learning inference orchestration framework for the browser end

End-to-end Machine Learning and Deep Learning pipelines from data preprocessing to model evaluation. Includes tools for cleaning data, feature engineering, model training, and performance evaluation. Modular and scalable, supporting frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Scikit-learn.

ML-Potion is all about crafting your own machine-learning elixir using the ingredients and frameworks you prefer. Think of the library as a set of building blocksatoms, steps, and componentsthat you can mix, match, and sequence to build a fully customized training or inference pipeline.
A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.

The Product Demand Prediction System (AI-DS) is a cutting-edge analytical framework that replaces reactive inventory management with data-driven foresight. By leveraging Machine Learning and Time-Series Analysis, it forecasts requirements with high precision, mitigating the "bullwhip effect" and optimizing global supply chain margins.

Multi-label learning has been a topic of research interest in multimedia, text & speech recognitions, music, image processing, information retrieval etc. In Multi-label classification (MLC) each instance is associated with a set of multiple class labels. Like other machine learning algorithms, data preprocessing plays an key role in MLC. Feature selection is an important preprocessing step in MLC, due to high dimensionality of datasets and associated computational costs. Extracting the most info
IE University Capstone: Airline Passenger Satisfaction  Integrated Psychometric & ML Framework (IRT, K-Means, Random Forest, SHAP, Strategic Priority Matrix)

An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations
An inference server for your machine learning models, including support for multiple frameworks, multi-model serving and more
A differentiable PDE solving framework for machine learning
A Multi-Operator Equivariant Framework for High-Performance Machine Learning Force Fields, supporting External Fields embedding and Physical Tensors prediction.
Learn AI and machine learning from scratch with Python  pure math to neural networks to LLM API in one Jupyter notebook. No frameworks, no black boxes. Built for absolute beginners.
Building machine learning systems from scratch, with focus on reinforcement learning, performance, and low-level implementation in C++
Workflow / framework for machine learning with data sourced from Google Earth Engine on a bare metal machine.
ML.NET is an open source and cross-platform machine learning framework for .NET.
A heterogeneous machine learning framework for APT threat attribution, specifically tailored for RAT-APT relationships.
Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

A low-level simulation of an artificial neuron built using datapath-inspired architecture. This project explores how fundamental hardware components such as memory, registers, and ALU operations impact the computational cost of machine learning models, providing a deeper understanding of AI beyond high-level frameworks.
A machine learning framework for large-scale land subsidence forecasting using Sentinel-1 InSAR time-series, ERA5-Land climate reanalysis, and SoilGrids data across 8 strategic regions in Iran.

This repository presents a comparative computer vision and machine learning framework for the automated diagnosis of Bacterial Blight / Black Rot in mustard plants, a high-impact agricultural disease caused by Xanthomonas campestris pv. campestris (Xcc).
In this repository different AI/ML algorithms are implemented by using PyTorch framework for learning purpose.
A unified framework for machine learning collective variables for enhanced sampling simulations

A real-time, hybrid Graph Neural Network (GNN) and machine learning framework to detect organized fraud rings and synthetic identities in mobile money ecosystems. Features a dynamic transaction graph, PyTorch Geometric, Neo4j, and a FastAPI backend

Collection of applied AI projects covering Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Transformers, Computer Vision, and NLP. Demonstrates practical system building including chatbots, recommendation engines, data analysis, and model training using modern AI tools and frameworks.

Research2Repo is an advanced, agentic framework designed to bridge the gap between academic machine learning research and functional codebase implementations. Specifically optimized for the Google Gemini ecosystem, it translates complex AI papers directly into modular, decoupled GitHub repositories.

This repository provides a machine learning and econometric framework to forecast Bangladesh's regional wheat flour prices through 2030. Integrating predictive modeling with rigorous econometrics, it tackles supply disruptions and inflation to provide vital insights for food security, policy-making, and long-term economic stability.
This repository contains the implementation of MFCC-GNB XtractNet, a novel hybrid machine learning framework for detecting deepfake and synthetic voice recordings

A curated portfolio of AI, Machine Learning, and Automation projects showcasing expertise in deep learning, NLP, web scraping, and data visualization. Includes work on recommendation systems, face embeddings, financial forecasting, and applied AI solutions built with Python, FastAPI, Django, and modern ML frameworks.
This is a python package to reproduce the results for a paper entitled : "A Machine Learning Framework for Turbofan Health Estimation via Inverse Problem Formulation"

OptiCover Analytics is a high-performance machine learning framework developed . The system is engineered to solve a complex multi-class classification problem, accurately predicting which of ten distinct insurance coverage bundlesranging from AutoLiability_Basic to PremiumHealthLife a prospective customer is most likely to select.

Graph-informed Gaussian Process Regression framework for leak detection in water distribution networks. The method reconstructs spatio-temporal pressure fields from sparse data, enabling physics-aware leak localization and parameter estimation using interpretable kernels and machine learning models.
Pure Go machine learning framework. Train, run, and serve ML models with go build. Zero CGo.
Machine learning frameworks for real-time pH/CO2 forecasting and high-dimensional analysis in chemical systems.
Tech Soft 3D tutorials of python CAD framework for machine learning development. Requires HOOPS AI
Machine Learning and Deep Learning based projects developed using Python and python related frameworks
Neuro-Symbolic AI framework for automated cyber threat intelligence generation using hybrid reasoning, machine learning, and knowledge graphs.

Machine learning analysis for the AI-Driven Digital Transformation Skills Framework, including text preprocessing, skill extraction, topic modeling (LDA), and clustering (K-means and hierarchical clustering).

This repository implements a security-aware ambient intelligence framework for the detection of violent and threatening language in airline customer reviews. The proposed approach leverages advanced natural language processing (NLP) techniques and supervised machine learning models to perform multi-class classification.
Open Machine Learning Compiler Framework
ML-APT: Machine Learning-enhanced Atom ProbeTomography Framework

The performance of different machine learning frameworks, like the support vector machine (SVM), random forest, gradient descent, and decision tree, is implemented to enhance the performance of the OFDM system model. The project can give effective performance concerning the machine learning model for different numbers of pilots and lengths of CPs.
End-to-end Machine Learning algorithms implemented from scratch using only Python and NumPy. Focused on understanding the underlying mathematics and linear algebra without high-level frameworks.

An advanced security monitoring framework that integrates Wazuh SIEM with Machine Learning to automate event correlation and alert classification. This project focuses on reducing "alert fatigue" by using Random Forest classifiers to distinguish between real threats and false positives in real-time network traffic.
A machine learning-based predictive modelling framework for early detection and classification of human diseases using patient health parameters such as age, glucose level, BMI, and blood pressure.
Molecular machine learning benchmarking framework

Machine Learning-based Network Intrusion Detection System using CICIDS2017 dataset with high accuracy classification of benign and malicious traffic using Random Forest, XGBoost, and Isolation Forest.

JNet is a Java machine learning framework consisting of tools and libraries for building and running neural networks and machine learning models through built-in APIs. Just like previous frameworks, it is a great place to get your hands dirty and experiment with the guts of a model directly!

A modular and vectorized backtesting engine for evaluating multiple trading strategies. Includes technical indicators, machine learning models, grid search optimization, and detailed performance analytics using Pandas, NumPy, and scikit-learn.
This repo contains the code structure of the IEEE paper "A Machine Learning Framework for Patient Stratification & Complications Prediction"

A modular computational research framework for building, evaluating, and analysing advanced machine learning models in healthcare and cognitive decision-making domains. Includes explainability, uncertainty analysis, and reproducible experimental pipelines.
A computer vision and machine learning pipeline on a distributed framework. Designed for an embedded network on low voltage IoT hardware.

A privacy-preserving healthcare AI framework aligned with DPDP regulations, combining machine learning, secure data pipelines, and analytics to enable compliant predictive modeling and clinical decision support.
Hybrid ensemble machine learning and deep learning framework for accurate and explainable software cost estimation.
A comparative machine learning framework for predicting physicochemical properties using 28 novel Weighted Sombor Indices.
Proyecto de Machine Learning para predecir la supervivencia en el Titanic usando Regresin Logstica y el framework CRISP-DM. Trabajo Sumativo 1 - U. Mayor

This repository provides a machine learning framework that integrates structural and coevolutionary features to classify mutations as compensatory, offering insights into evolutionary adaptation and protein stability

Quantum Tensor Networks Circuits is a modular framework for building and benchmarking variational quantum circuits based on tensor networks. The framework allows for various encoding methods and ansatz topologies, thus enabling the comparison of their precision and expressibility in quantum machine learning applications.
AURA  Dual-model machine learning framework for customer churn risk classification and lead-time prediction in cloud services, implemented with XGBoost, FastAPI, and Streamlit.
A machine learning framework that takes SMILES and identifies the Tg.

A machine learning project that predicts diabetes-related complications such as cardiovascular disease, kidney disease, and neuropathy using patient clinical data. The project includes data cleaning, preprocessing, feature engineering, exploratory data analysis, and a multi-label classification framework.

PhosBind is a machine learning framework that leverages ESM2 protein embeddings to predict and classify anion-binding sites, with a focus on phosphate recognition. It enables data-driven insights into proteinanion interactions for applications in biomolecular design and nutrient recovery.
Predicting Gene Expression Divergence between Nested Genes in Human and Mouse Species and two Species of Drosophila using PredIcting eXpression dIvergence (PiXi), a Machine Learning Framework

Crop Recommendation System A web application created using the Flask framework that uses a trained machine learning model to recommend the best crop suitable for cultivation given the soil and environmental factors. The application accepts various parameters such as Nitrogen, Phosphorus, Potassium, temperature, humidity, pH, rainfall, etc., proc
This project is my hands-on portfolio to deepen understanding of machine learning and deep learning pipelines.
An open-source framework that configures AI as a genuine tutor  not an answer machine.

This C++ machine learning framework uses concepts, templates, and expression templates for efficient, modular neural network development. It supports matrix operations, layers (e.g., `weight_net_t`, `sigmoid_net_t`), optimizers (SGD, Adam, Nadam), and initialization methods (Xavier, He). Designed for performance and extensibility.
Build and deploy machine learning models with Pontos, an efficient framework that simplifies workflows using Python, PyTorch, and Docker.

An advanced framework for mechanical fault diagnosis using Physics-Informed Machine Learning (PiML). Combines TLS-DMD, physics-driven feature extraction, and Random Forest on the CWRU Bearing Dataset to achieve 98-99% accuracy.

scikit-learn_bench benchmarks various implementations of machine learning algorithms across data analytics frameworks. It currently support the scikit-learn, DAAL4PY, cuML, and XGBoost frameworks for commonly used machine learning algorithms.
Machine Learning framework built from scratch in C++.
Simulated adversarial attacks on smart grid environments using the Grid2Op framework
Folax (Finite Operator Learning with JAX) is a framework for solving and optimizing PDEs by integrating machine learning with numerical methods in computational mechanics.
Leakage-free Machine Learning Framework for Diabetes Risk Prediction
A multimodal machine learning framework for tourism satisfaction prediction using BERT, ResNet, and DDA-optimized CatBoost with feature fusion and interpretability analysis.

This repository contains the complete analytical pipeline for a study on fish freshness classification. The analysis leverages advanced machine learning methods implemented within the mlr3 framework, enabling robust model training, evaluation, and comparison.

A Machine learning model leveraging SMILES-derived NMR spectroscopy data to predict dopamine D1 receptor antagonists: a prospective framework for forecasting the impact of engineered nanoparticles on the functionalities of small biomolecules
A dual-layered security framework using Machine Learning for PE-header based malware detection (KNN) and behavioral fraud analysis (Isolation Forest & K-Means).
A practical framework for AI-Assisted Research in Mathematics and Machine Learning
A comprehensive machine learning framework for quantitative trading strategies
A modular machine learning framework for budget execution & data analysis built in Python with Scikit, XGBoost, PyTorch, and TensorFlow.
A framework for privacy-preserving federated machine learning.
Experimental framework for studying shortcut learning under spurious correlations in machine learning models.
A flexible and modular machine learning framework designed to support leakage-free model training through custom cross-validation fold construction
A high-level orchestration and pipeline framework for quantum machine learning
Machine learning framework for predicting electrolyte stability in lithium-ion batteries
Machine Learning framework for cloud cost prediction and idle resource detection.

Capstone project for the Imperial College London AI & Machine Learning Certificate, showcasing end-to-end ML development  from data preparation to model training, evaluation, and insights using Python and modern ML frameworks.
A Swift project for developing machine learning applications on Apple platforms (iOS, macOS), leveraging Core ML and other frameworks.
A curated collection of AI and Machine Learning projects showcasing practical implementations of models, data pipelines, and real-world problem solving using modern frameworks
Repository for the publication: Predicting Immune Checkpoint Blockade Response: A Multi-Omics-Based Machine Learning Framework and Network Analysis of Key Genes
Reproducible machine learning framework for ICU mortality prediction using MIMIC-IV and eICU datasets with external validation, calibration analysis, and decision curve evaluation.

Matrix AI is a comprehensive machine learning framework designed to bridge the gap between material science and economic forecasting. This project leverages advanced ensemble modeling to predict material properties, assess structural stability, and forecast commodity price fluctuations to facilitate data-driven inverse design.
Federated and fairness-aware machine learning framework for rural healthcare risk prediction, enabling privacy-preserving, interpretable, and equitable insights under data scarcity.

This project is a Machine Learning-based web application that predicts the price of a car based on various features such as brand, year, fuel type, and more. The model is trained using a dataset of used cars and deployed using a Flask web framework to provide real-time predictions through a user-friendly interface.
Fepfm: A Post-Disturbance Frequency Extremes Prediction Framework for Power Systems Based on Trustworthy Machine Learning
Machine Learning framework built from scratch in CPP.
A machine learning-aided bug prediction framework for Java projects combining static code analysis and evolutionary context modeling.
A reproducible framework for scoring and analysing the accessibility of UK healthcare facilities for disabled populations using geospatial data and machine learning.
Machine learning framework for detecting, classifying, and correcting harmonic distortions in power system signals using signal processing and deep learning techniques.

A deep dive into the mathematical core of Machine Learning. Purely NumPy-based implementations of Neural Networks (MLPs) and Gradient Descent from scratch. Features an MNIST Handwritten Digit Classifier achieving ~90% accuracy without high-level frameworks like TensorFlow/PyTorch.
